body_excerpt: In multiple functions of mremap.c, there is a possible use-after-free scenario in physical memory due to a race condition. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In multiple functions of mremap.c, there is a possible use-after-free scenario in physical memory due to a race condition. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution
